mac.notes: Universal Control now works both ways: slide the cursor off the Mac's right edge to control the phone, and off the phone's left edge to hand it back to the Mac (⌃⌥⌘ still toggles too). Keyboard needs Input Monitoring — grant it when asked.

android.notes: Universal Control: push the cursor off the phone's left edge to return control to the Mac. Plus density-consistent cursor speed.
